content:
Welcome fighters!
Welcome to my little corner of the internet — a place where I document my Red Teaming journey, deep-dive malware case studies, personal notes, and hands-on exploitations in custom lab environments, plus my most favourite part how to stay anoynymous in the surface web as well as inside the darkweb.
If you’re into building things as well as breaking those stuffs to understand them — you’re in the right place.
🧭 What You’ll Find Here
🔥 Red Teaming Notes
I share real-world notes and tactics I’ve picked up through learning, labs, and exercises. Think of it as my personal “Field Manual” — from privilege escalation to lateral movement and beyond.
💣 Malware Case Studies - story based
Ever wondered how real malware campaigns work under the hood? I break down notable strains and techniques step-by-step — from simplifying deep technical constraints into simple words and the history of the malware, how it’s developed, what was it’s origin, an absolute story.
🧪 Lab Setups & Exploitations
I build offensive labs from scratch — Active Directory setups, misconfigurations, pivoting environments — and walk through my exploitations with real tooling and thought process.
🚀 My Journey
I also log my personal growth: certifications I pursue, challenges I overcome, and what I learn along the way — raw and unfiltered.
🧠 Who Is This For?
Whether you’re: •	A Red Teamer in the making, •	Nerds who want to change the system. •	Or someone who loves building and breaking systems…
This blog is designed to share, teach, and grow together.
🛠️ Ongoing Work
This site is a live project. I update as I learn — so expect new posts, refined notes, and more lab walkthroughs on weekly basis.
Feel free to browse through the Blogs, check out my Notes, or dive into Tags to filter by topics of interest.
What’s legal is not always fair.
Sergio Marquina
